data.name: Hentai Tales: The Gyaru's Secret Hobby
data.detailed_description:
遊戲玩法

在解開燒腦謎題的同時享受撩人故事！
按順序連接數字，填滿棋盤上的所有方格
完成謎題後，你將解鎖全新性感圖片與後續劇情！
你能解開所有謎題，邂逅全部的女孩嗎？！

故事背景

當我發現班上那位豔光四射的辣妹竟和我一樣是狂熱的AV鑑賞家時，獨行俠的人生就此天翻地覆。放學後尷尬的相遇，很快發展成遠超共同觀賞成人影片的親密關係。

登場角色

風野ひおり：

班上活力十足的褐髮辣妹，擁有W罩杯的傲人身材與驚人的成人影片知識量。開朗性格下藏著令人意外的熾熱一面。

黒川ほたる：

羞怯的黑髮同班同學，具備X罩杯的魔鬼曲線，實為ひおり長期的AV觀影夥伴。雖生性膽小，卻對成人影片製作技術有著驚人的專業造詣。

特色內容

  • 收錄20張美少女的性感撩人圖像
  • 與性格鮮明的少女們共譜夢幻情慾篇章
  • 可跳過謎題專注體驗劇情（謎題進行時按下Enter鍵）
  • CG鑑賞模式（解謎後點擊CG兩側箭頭切換）

data.name: Hentai Tales: The Gyaru's Secret Hobby
data.detailed_description:
GamePlay

Enjoy a sensual story while completing tricky puzzles!
Connect the numbers sequentially, using all of the squares on the board
After completing a puzzle, you will unlock a sexy new image and the next part of the story!
Can you complete every puzzle and meet all of the girls?!

Story Background

My life as a loner takes an unexpected turn when I discover the gorgeous gyaru girl from my class has a secret hobby—she's a passionate AV connoisseur just like me. What starts as awkward encounters after school soon evolves into a relationship that goes far beyond just watching adult films together.

Characters

Kazano Hiori:

The energetic, brown-haired gyaru girl from my class with W-cup assets and a surprisingly deep knowledge of adult films. Her cheerful personality hides an unexpectedly passionate side.

Kurokawa Hotaru:

A shy, black-haired classmate with an X-cup figure who turns out to be Hiori's longtime AV-watching partner. Though timid, she's surprisingly well-versed in the technical aspects of adult video production.

Features

  • 20 sexy and erotic images of beautiful girls.
  • A fantastical erotic story with girls who have unique personalities.
  • You can skip the puzzles if you just want to enjoy the story. (Press Enter during a puzzle).
  • CG Gallery mode. (Click the left and right buttons next to the CG after completing a puzzle).
